nasb.text: He will pitch the tents of his royal pavilion between the seas and the beautiful Holy Mountain; yet he will come to his end, and no one will help him.

esv.text: And he shall pitch his palatial tents between the sea and the glorious holy mountain. Yet he shall come to his end, with none to help him.

cnv.text: 他必在海和榮美的聖山之間支搭如宮殿一般的帳幕；然而他們的結局來到，必沒有人能幫助他。”

ccb.text: 他必在海和荣美的圣山之间搭起他宫殿般的帐幕。但他必灭亡，无人相助。
